summary: Tested all features from the review request: SVG cake removal from hero/intro sections, Chef's Portal Customizer tab with sub-tabs, and full CRUD for customizer options. All 11 backend tests passed. Frontend UI fully verified.
seed_data_creation: No seed data created - used existing seeded customizer data
context_for_next_testing_agent: All customizer features are working. Backend seeded with 14 sponges, 10 fillings, 9 frostings, 39 decos. Portal uses JWT in sessionStorage. Portal login: POST /api/admin/login with {password: 'evridiki2025'}. The confirm dialog for delete must be overridden in Playwright via window.confirm = () => true before clicking delete button.
